features: Door hooks for hanging clothes are adopt with brushed nickel-plated process can better reflect the texture of the bathrobe hook material smooth and safe.
Cylindrical bath robe hook are made of good stainless steel material, which has good anti-rust and waterproof for durable in use, suitable for bathroom or doors to hanging clothes
The hooks base has a protective cover that can be removed to hide our stainless steel mounting screws, which makes dressing gown hooks looks neat
One hooks consist of a base, 3pcs screw, cylinder ,So can bear a certain weight(about 5kg).6 pieces wall-mount robe hooks, hook length: 2inch, basic diameter:1.57inch.

Stainless steel clothes hooks are suitable for bathroom, kitchen, door,cupboard,like hang up winter coats,basket,hats,hanging up cutting board,umbrellas,towels,hanging plants,hang a variety of keys or robes, good helpmate for home storage.
description: Product Description KINDPMA 6pcs Robe Hooks 304 Stainless Steel Coat Hooks Waterproof It is water and rust resistant and can work in wet environments. Specification Hook material : Stainless steel Anchor material: Plastic Screw material: Stainless steel Finish : Brushed nickel Basic diameter:1.57"/4cm Hook length: 2"/5cm Package Includes 6pcs chrome hooks 18pcs screws and 18pcs anchors Suitable for kids Cylindrical design with a smooth surface that will not scratch the skin and is safe for kids. Hooks on the door Installed it behind the door for hanging umbrellas, bags, hats and keys. Bathrobe hook Mounted on the wall to hang bathrobes, towels, coats and scarves.
